nasb.text: But the people, the men of Israel, encouraged themselves and arrayed for battle again in the place where they had arrayed themselves the first day.

esv.text: But the people, the men of Israel, took courage, and again formed the battle line in the same place where they had formed it on the first day.

cnv.text: 眾民，就是以色列人，都奮勇起來，又在頭一天列陣的地方列陣。

ccb.text: 以色列人重整士气，仍在第一天列阵的地方列阵。
